verified_surface: Snapshots page currently exposes 264 dated `.tar.bz2` backup links; bounded range request on the latest archive returned `Content-Range: bytes 0-0/97478763`, `Last-Modified: Mon, 01 Jun 2026 12:02:05 GMT`, and `ETag: "b726ac06742782b67439e1247ca21c6c-12"`.
verified_detail: This confirms a live public archive series and one exact latest-object locator/size signal without mirroring the archive locally.
paper_use: Methods appendix or provenance note showing that the AIID bulk surface is a real public snapshot series rather than a generic homepage-only claim.
uncertainty: Archive catalog visibility does not by itself prove stable long-term schema semantics or unrestricted bulk-reuse posture.

verified_surface: The streamed header is `_id, incident_id, date, reports, Alleged deployer of AI system, Alleged developer of AI system, Alleged harmed or nearly harmed parties, description, title`.
verified_detail: This adds one exact bounded field-family verification step beyond previously observed BSON top-level keys by showing a public CSV export surface with incident ID, date, linked report list, actor-role columns, narrative description, and title.
paper_use: Reviewer-safe field-map row for AIID incident export semantics and one dashboard-ready actor-role/description/title alignment note.
uncertainty: Only the header and first data row were inspected; this cycle does not claim full column semantics, nullability rules, or stable downstream typing.
observatory_hook: Field-role appendix expansion and actor-role comparison panel.

verified_surface: The streamed header is `_id, authors, date_downloaded, date_modified, date_published, date_submitted, description, epoch_date_downloaded, epoch_date_modified, epoch_date_published, epoch_date_submitted, image_url, language, ref_number, report_number, source_domain, submitters, text, title, url, tags`.

verified_surface: The streamed header includes `Namespace`, `Incident ID`, `Published`, `Known AI Goal`, `Potential AI Goal`, `Known AI Technology`, `Potential AI Technology`, `Known AI Technical Failure`, and `Potential AI Technical Failure` plus snippet/discussion companion columns.
verified_detail: This is the missing bounded taxonomy/classification field-family signal: AIID's public snapshot series includes explicit classification exports tied to incident IDs, with known/potential goal, technology, and technical-failure dimensions.
paper_use: Strong reviewer-safe appendix row showing that AIID can contribute bounded classification overlays, not only incident titles/dates.

observatory_hook: Taxonomy heatmap and known-vs-potential classification layer for the dashboard.

verified_surface: `aiidprod/incidents.metadata.json` confirms collection name `incidents` with `_id_` and `incident_id_idx`; `aiidprod/classifications.metadata.json` confirms collection `classifications`; `aiidprod/taxa.metadata.json` confirms collection `taxa`.
